title: cyathea subincisa
intro: Cyathea subincisa, also known as the 'Black Tree Fern', is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathea subincisa include the ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies for its wound-healing and antiseptic properties.
